intentSynonyms: permanently delete a reply in gdocs
delete a reply in google docs
description: Permanently delete a reply from a comment thread on a Google Doc. Only the reply author or the document owner can delete replies. This action cannot be undone.

document_id.description: Google Docs document ID. Defaults to the document open in the current editor tab.

comment_id.description: Comment thread ID containing the reply (from list_comments)

reply_id.description: Reply ID to delete (from list_comments replies array)
